title: 99 Pcs Halloween Potion Bottles Set,Halloween Decorations Indoor,Apothecary Bottles with Halloween Stickers & Pendants for Halloween Decor,Halloween Tiered Tray Decor Indoor Room Party Supplies
description:
About this item
Halloween Decor Package Include:30 Pcs glass potion bottles with cork(3 Size), 30 x kraft halloween apothecary labels, 30 x halloween metal sign,5 x organza bags of 5 different colors,2 x small plastic funnel (1.22 inch), 2 x burlap twine (yellow & black,20m);（The Package Does Not Contain Poison Ingredients,For decoration only and not intended for use in magical brewing.）
Reliable Material：The bottle is evenly inserted into the foam to minimize damage during shipping.These Self-adhesive Halloween labels are durable,No fading,waterproof and easy to peel.Halloween metal pendants, 10 different themes, can be used to decorate halloween magic poison bottles and can also be used to make halloween bracelets.
Spooky Style:You can fill the small bottle with colored water,crystal particles,powder,animal hair,etc.Then stick the Halloween witch label sticker.Tie a Halloween pendant around the bottle with twine. Such a Halloween potion bottle is complete.Each spooky Halloween lable sticker features different Halloween magic illustration and text paired with damask pattern.Full of Halloween magic style, horror & fun.Creating a collection of different creepy bottle for Halloween.
Wide Applications: Halloween bottles are filled with colored water,crystal particles,powder,animal hair or complete the rest of Halloween decorations.Halloween potion bottles can be used to decorate halloween party's, halloween tiered trays, halloween rooms,witch potion shelves,halloween tabletops,halloween fireplace decorations.Halloween labels & metal sign can also be used scrapbooking or handcraft.
Magic & Horror for Halloween: Use them as party favors,All the kids attending the Halloween party have chance to create beautiful magic potion,to store various herbs,potions,gems,diamonds and other accessories,and more;These magical decorations make kids spend a special Halloween Party's.
reviews_5s:
We as a family, normally do little seasonal crafts then I leave them out for that season. This year we made potions and it was a good time for all and they look good too.Very nice, and a lot included for the price. I expected them to be lower quality based on how cheap they were. The stickers peel off if you get them wet, but otherwise are good. Cute little charms and labels.They were very cool. Added a different aspect to what I was trying.Great itemThis set is adorable! Each part is well made and isn’t flimsy or low quality.
I didn’t end up getting them ready in time for Halloween because I’m going all out trying to put stuff in the bottles to match what the labels say.
They aren’t just bottles meant to hold liquid either…they’re like ingredient bottles of what you would find in a witch’s kitchen spice rack.
I don’t remember what the label says exactly but one is even meant to hold the hair of some supernatural creature. My daughter’s Barbies are about to get some small unnoticeable ninja haircuts. It’s such a cool set and could even be a family activity to fill the bottles.
Great deal for the price. I’m impressed for sure.I purchased this after comparing it to several kits that were similar, tbh. I found this particular kit to be the best for the $$. It came with some very cute accessories that added an extra touch to the "potion making" process for my daughter. She was so happy with this and because it came with so many, she is still making potions. We love it. Very happy customers. Would highly recommend.My daughter's birthday is on Halloween so even though she's in her 30s we've always made her party fun woth a Halloween costume party. So this year we're going to set up out basement like scenes from Harry Potter. Which my grandchildren are old enough to enjoy a semi scary Halloween party which is going to start being a tradition too. So this is going to be part of the scenery. I can't wait to get it set up. The labels and bottle are high quality and I know they will last for years.I really just needed the labels bc it’s for a 7yr old birthday party but if I was doing an adult event the tubes would have come in handy. It was just too messy to transfer glitter for kids who don’t care…the set is great though and I’ll use everything eventually for future halloween stuff. Arrived very quickly too!Got these for my daughter to update her plague doctor costume. She loved them and the various sizes.
We also used wide masking tape toake our own labels to supplement with the provided labelsLove these thought the bottles were gonna be bigger, but that's ok
reviews_1s: These bottles are tiny - much smaller than I had expected them to be.
